cn: Open the English workbench with the real jethrozz lead.
Select the lead and load the long-term memory profile.
The profile is built from real conversation context: Gaoxin, three rooms, metro access, and school priority.
Inspect MemWal memory and Walrus evidence so the source context remains traceable.
Return to follow-up and click Start follow-up. The manual Send button is not used.
The background worker takes over the live lead while the device feed stays visible.
Now simulate a worker crash and expire the lease.
Another agent claims the lead and restores context from long-term memory.
After handoff, the agent trace records a verifiable recovery event.
